type_fields.tier_description: White-label experience with custom branding across all customer surfaces
Self-serve support via help center and community forum
Email and chat support with priority response during business hours
Dedicated support team with priority escalation and direct Slack channel

content_ui_paths.name: Checkout: Professional
content_ui_paths.description: Opens Stripe Checkout for the Professional plan

content_ui_paths.name: Checkout: Expansion Pack
content_ui_paths.description: Opens Stripe Checkout for Advanced Expansion Pack 1

content_ui_paths.name: Contact Sales
content_ui_paths.description: Routes to sales contact form or Calendly booking

content_ui_paths.name: View Pricing
content_ui_paths.description: Navigates to external pricing page with plan comparison

content_ui_paths.name: Switch to Annual
content_ui_paths.description: Opens billing period switch flow with proration preview

fields.body: Full product access on every plan. Upgrade when you need professional white-label delivery.
Renews {{reset_date}}
Get your data as files to share anywhere — email, Slack, presentations, social media. Professional plan starts at $55/mo.
Bulk export all your data in standard formats for downstream systems and integrations. Professional plan starts at $55/mo.

fields.message: Deliver fully white-labeled experiences without the Sandbox brand.

fields.header: Match your brand identity across the product
fields.body: Set up your brand colors, fonts, and logo once. Apply them across every customer-facing surface with one click.
Track usage, engagement, and completion metrics across your product.
Add up to 3 editors to your workspace. Share templates, review drafts, and collaborate together. Professional plan starts at $55/mo.
Upgrade to Professional for 360 credits/yr
Professional gives you 360 credits/yr (30/mo) to keep working. Starts at $55/mo.
fields.secondary_body: Your balance refreshes with +5 credits on your next login.

fields.body: You've used your 5 free Premium credits. Professional gives you 120 Premium credits/yr for higher-tier work. Starts at $55/mo.
fields.secondary_body: You can still keep working with Core credits.

fields.body: Delete an existing project to make room, or upgrade to Professional for unlimited projects.

fields.header: Welcome! You have full Professional access for 14 days
fields.body: Try data export, bulk export, brand kit, and analytics.
Keep access to data export, bulk export, and brand kit.
Here's what you'll lose: data export, bulk export, brand kit, and analytics.

fields.subject: Your Professional trial ends in 2 days
fields.preheader: Here's what you created — and what you'll lose
fields.body: During your trial, you used {{usage_current}} Core credits. On expiry, you'll lose access to data export, bulk export, brand kit, and analytics.
Your data is safe — upgrade anytime to unlock data export, bulk export, brand kit, and analytics again.

placements.name: E1: Advanced Monthly Cap — Expansion Pack

fields.header: You've used your monthly Premium credits
fields.body: Add an Expansion Pack for 240 more Premium credits/yr. Available on annual plans only.
